impact: A failed switch can leave a durable invalid override and stop the previously working model while API/UI transport still looks successful.
remediation: Introduce a manifest/shard/architecture compatibility gate and a staged switch with health confirmation and rollback.
root: Activation validates identity/name rather than artifacts and is implemented as several non-transactional state changes.
summary: An empty custom model directory is activatable; the UI persists the override, stops the working dispatcher and starts the replacement without checking either result or restoring the prior runtime.
title: Model activation accepts unverified directories and has no rollback

impact: A stop invocation can terminate a dispatcher not started by this launcher run.
remediation: Fail closed on absent/corrupt state; persist state atomically with runtime identity and verify it before stop.
root: Ownership predicate defaults to true on absent evidence and state is written non-atomically.
summary: Missing/corrupt launcher-state.json is interpreted as ownership of the dispatcher instead of unknown ownership.
title: Launcher stop fails open when ownership state is missing or corrupt

impact: Editors, terminals or diagnostic commands mentioning the repo path may be killed.
remediation: Track exact child identities and terminate only verified descendants owned by the active launcher state.
root: Cleanup uses substring ownership inference instead of recorded PID plus birth identity.
summary: Any process whose executable or command line contains the repo/frontend path is treated as a Jarvis process and terminated.
title: Launcher process cleanup signature can match unrelated processes

impact: Compose startup can reject the dependency or leave frontend blocked, depending on Compose implementation/version.
remediation: Add a pinned backend healthcheck or use a condition whose semantics match the service definition, then test rendered Compose in CI.
root: Dependency condition and service contract drifted independently.
summary: frontend depends_on backend with condition service_healthy, but backend defines no healthcheck.
title: Compose frontend waits for a backend healthcheck that does not exist

impact: Untrusted public content may cause browser requests to private/link-local destinations.
remediation: Apply one public-only resolver/redirect/subresource policy to every browser request and navigation.
root: The hardened core HTTP path and the Playwright path implement different destination policies.
summary: Deep research and shopping accept result strings by HTTP prefix and navigate without the core transport's DNS pinning and per-redirect validation; subresources are not uniformly guarded.
title: Bundled browser does not enforce public-only validation on every navigation hop

impact: A browser compromise has a materially wider secret/data blast radius than documented containment implies.
remediation: Allowlist worker env, isolate writable roots, enable/verify browser sandboxing and test effective runtime privileges.
root: Process-tree containment was implemented without an environment/filesystem capability boundary; deployment tests inspect the Dockerfile, not actual launch args.
summary: The worker receives the full environment (including API/search keys), retains writable /runtime access and launches Chromium with --no-sandbox.
title: Browser worker inherits secrets/runtime access while Chromium sandbox is disabled

impact: A failed call can be committed by a later unrelated operation; DB and vault may diverge.
remediation: Wrap each logical mutation in explicit transaction/rollback and define ordering or an outbox for filesystem mirrors.
root: One long-lived connection is managed by ad-hoc commits rather than an exception-safe unit-of-work boundary.
summary: Several DB+filesystem methods commit only after MemoryVault/file work and do not rollback when that later work throws.
title: JarvisStorage operations can leave a poisoned transaction after exceptions

impact: Concurrent updates can be lost and observers can see a started job that never ran or produced a terminal event.
remediation: Use transactional row/CAS state transitions and return/publish the result of a single admission decision.
root: Durable job state is not row/lease based and transport success is emitted before authoritative admission.
summary: Jobs/history are whole JSON arrays updated without CAS; /start emits started before admission, while paused/done/cancelled/already-running jobs are rejected silently by the executor.
title: Autonomy job JSON-array RMW loses concurrency and detached start reports false success

impact: Audit failure can strand/ambiguously report approval state; nested environment/argument credentials can persist and be returned by API.
remediation: Redact before persistence and commit transition plus durable event/outbox atomically.
root: Approval persistence lacks a transactional outbox and redaction is applied to terminal results but not creation/audit payloads.
summary: Approval transitions commit separately from audit writes, and creation persists exact unredacted tool arguments in both approval and audit rows.
title: Approval state/audit are non-atomic and raw payloads can retain credentials

impact: A lost response/retry can duplicate append/process/GUI effects; concurrent turns can interleave; a sufficiently old execution key can be reapplied.
remediation: Require request IDs, serialize conversation turns and retain non-replay tombstones beyond result-detail retention.
root: Idempotency is scoped to short-lived authorization/retained results rather than a caller key with an explicit durable expiry contract.
summary: Chat has no request idempotency or per-conversation serialization; old durable execution keys are evicted with no tombstone.
title: Transport retries can repeat actions after replay retention or new chat authorization

impact: A file under an allowed directory may copy/index outside-root data; sensitive content is stored without redaction.
remediation: Revalidate resolved targets, reject symlink escapes and define explicit sensitive-file inclusion policy with redacted evidence.
root: Directory enumeration and per-file canonicalization use different trust-boundary checks.
summary: Recursive ingest includes .env/config/log files and resolves file symlinks without rechecking containment after resolution.
title: Directory ingest can follow symlinks outside allowed roots and index sensitive files

impact: A rejected archive can leave a misleading or partially trusted tree that later workflows consume.
remediation: Extract into a unique staging root, validate fully, atomically publish, and remove staging on every failure.
root: Extraction has no staging directory/transactional rename and exception cleanup.
summary: ZIP/TAR/stream extraction writes to final destinations before all limits succeed; 7z validates sizes after extraction.
title: Failed archive extraction leaves partial final outputs

impact: A small input can stall chat, jobs, health and cancellation for an unbounded interval.
remediation: Use a safe regex engine/subset or isolated subprocess with hard wall-clock and size budgets.
root: Regex complexity is not constrained and execution is not isolated in a killable worker.
summary: web.watch and document/archive searches run arbitrary syntactically valid Python regex synchronously; asyncio timeouts cannot preempt catastrophic matching.
title: User regex can block the async event loop beyond cancellation budgets

impact: Operators cannot distinguish disabled realtime transport from an idle healthy feed.
remediation: Implement authenticated same-origin realtime transport or remove/label the inactive surface consistently.
root: Direct browser WS was removed without a same-origin replacement or UX/docs contract update.
summary: wsUrl always returns empty and the connection effect exits, yet active UI shows waiting for events and public docs promise /ws/events.
title: Command Center advertises a live WebSocket feed whose transport is disabled

impact: A stopped backend/dispatcher can remain displayed as online/ready with no stale timestamp.
remediation: Track last-success/failure per source, expire snapshots and render explicit stale/offline/degraded states.
root: Polling stores values but no freshness/error state machine.
summary: Promise.allSettled rejections are never inspected and previous snapshots remain indefinitely; online is derived from the existence of old status.
title: Frontend retains stale online/ready state after polling failures

impact: Interrupted turns can appear stuck or successful and late updates can reach the wrong UI state.
remediation: Require exactly one terminal event, persist interrupted state and bind an AbortController to each turn/window.
root: Transport parser lacks a required terminal-state contract and request lifecycle ownership.
summary: Normal EOF is treated as success even without done/error, leaving a pending bubble; no AbortController exists for cancel/window switch.
title: Frontend stream accepts EOF without terminal state and cannot cancel requests

impact: Repeated/concurrent generation can overwrite an earlier artifact despite a never-overwrite claim.
remediation: Use exclusive create/UUID/counter retry and apply the same rule to archive output directories.
root: The fallback computes a non-exclusive name instead of atomically reserving a unique path.
summary: After the base path exists, collision fallback has one-second precision and does not verify that the timestamped candidate is unused.
title: Generated document collision logic reuses an existing timestamped path

impact: The documented Compose path can build successfully but provide an unusable Command Center.
remediation: Bootstrap a secret explicitly or fail preflight with an exact setup instruction; test both paths.
root: Token generation exists only in the PowerShell launcher, not in the documented Compose workflow.
summary: README quick start leaves JARVIS_API_TOKEN empty; the proxy hard-returns 503 without a token and the container client is non-loopback to backend.
title: Documented Compose quick start has no API token bootstrap

impact: Durable external jobs and filesystem outputs can be created through a lower trust gate than file.write.
remediation: Define danger policy per action and make missing classification fail closed for mutating tools.
root: No explicit product contract classifies these side effects; default-safe masks omissions.
summary: Document mutation/archive extraction/create and recurring web.watch add/remove omit danger_level, inheriting safe and skipping registry approval.
title: Mutating document/watch tools default to safe and bypass approval

impact: Clean/offline builds can drift, downgrade browser dependencies or unexpectedly require registries.
remediation: Remove obsolete/unused deps, install from one lock, pin image/action digests and document cached offline start separately from rebuild.
root: Multiple dependency manifests and runtime paths are not governed by one lock/image identity policy.
summary: An active hint installs stale conflicting surfer pins; unused httpx2 expands dev supply chain; CI ignores uv.lock and mutable image/action/apt inputs remain.
title: Dependency/build/offline contract is not reproducible from immutable inputs

impact: Corruption can weaken policy silently; upgrades/locks are under-specified; state grows without bound and delete semantics are privacy-ambiguous.
remediation: Add versioned migrations, strict policy decoding/quarantine, integrity/restore checks and explicit retention/purge semantics.
root: Storage evolved through CREATE IF NOT EXISTS and permissive decoders without an explicit lifecycle/retention contract.
summary: Malformed JSON is silently defaulted (browser policy defaults open), the DB has no user_version/migration registry/integrity gate, and append-only audit/events/learning have no purge; conversation delete retains copied dialogue in learning.
title: Main storage lacks versioned migration/integrity/retention and policy corruption fails open

impact: A page change alert can be lost permanently with no reconciliation evidence.
remediation: Persist detection plus pending notification atomically and acknowledge only after durable delivery.
root: Observed state and notification delivery are not connected by an outbox/acknowledgement state machine.
summary: The new digest is committed before event, memory and bus notification; a crash/error afterward makes retry see no change.
title: Web-watch persists digest before durable notification delivery

impact: A non-loopback deployment discloses host/runtime layout to unauthenticated clients.
remediation: Keep unauthenticated liveness minimal; guard detailed health and fail startup on unsafe bind/token combinations.
root: Detailed diagnostics and minimal liveness share one public endpoint.
summary: /health bypasses auth and includes settings.home; native defaults bind 0.0.0.0 with no loopback token requirement.
title: Unauthenticated health response exposes absolute runtime path

impact: Untrusted page instructions/provenance and invalid TLS are handled inconsistently across web paths.
remediation: Reuse one untrusted-content prompt/provenance contract and fail closed on TLS unless a narrowly approved exception exists.
root: The bundled surfer/synthesis path bypasses shared trust metadata and transport policy.
summary: The dedicated web synthesis prompt omits the core never-follow-source-instructions rule and surfer contexts ignore TLS certificate errors.
title: Bundled web synthesis/TLS trust policy is weaker than the core path

impact: Keyboard, focus, reduced-motion, stream and stale-state regressions can ship while typecheck/build remain green.
remediation: Add component boundaries and browser/component accessibility tests for critical states.
root: The UI is a 5.8k-line monolith and frontend CI has no behavioral test layer.
summary: Tabs/resize lack complete keyboard/ARIA semantics and there are no frontend unit, component, E2E or accessibility tests.
title: Frontend accessibility and test harness leave interaction regressions unchecked
